scripts.setup: pnpm setup:python && pnpm install && pnpm setup:backend && pnpm setup:ai
scripts.setup:dev: pnpm setup:python && pnpm install && pnpm setup:backend:dev && pnpm setup:ai
scripts.setup:backend:dev: cd backend && . ../venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
scripts.test: cd frontend && pnpm test && cd ../tests/backend && python -m pytest && cd ../../tests/e2e && pnpm test
